name: Kohl's Oriental Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Mushrooms, fresh - chopped and sliced
1 Beef boullion cube (or 2 tablespoons in 1 cup hot water)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large wok, sauté beef in oil until browned.
2. Add bouillon and everything else except noodles and rice.
3. Add some soy sauce and stir well often, keeping vegetables moving from the bottom to the top and sides of the wok.
4. Keep the wok covered between stirring.
5. Cook the rice according to package directions.
6. Serve when vegetables are tender and still crispy. Do NOT overcook! Vegetables should retain their original colors and be crisp.
7. Heap the meat and vegetable mixture onto rice or noodles or both.
8. Top with soy sauce.
